expect: F-NK6 3-mechanism model does NOT sustain improvement — 213% rate is burst artifact from historian cadence, not structural. Predict: excluding historian-burst sessions, rate drops below 0.24/session target
actual: FALSIFICATION CONFIRMED. Strict resolution rate = 0.00/session (n=12, S441-S452). Zero global frontiers RESOLVED — all resolution events (F-IC1, F-ECO6, F-EXP12) were domain-level. Liberal update rate = 0.33/session (all), 0.09/session excluding S441 historian burst. S446 measurement conflated updates with resolutions and counted domain events as global.
diff: Stronger falsification than predicted. Expected rate to drop below 0.24 — actual strict rate is 0.00. Not just burst artifact but metric conflation: linkage != resolution.

verdict.what_works: M1 structural linkage (10.1%->36.8%), M3 historian routing operational
verdict.what_doesnt: Resolution rate claim unsupported — governance routes attention, not closure
verdict.recommendation: Separate update/resolution metrics. Test resolution-targeting historian sessions.
